Compose ResourceSharers via an undirected wiring diagram

Source: R/dynam.R
oapply_dynam.Rd

Implements the operad algebra for undirected composition of dynamical systems. Each box of the UWD is filled by a resource sharer from sharers. States at the same junction are identified and derivatives (or updates) are summed.

Usage

oapply_dynam(d, sharers)

Arguments

d

A UWD ACSet (from catlab)

sharers

A list of ResourceSharer objects, one per box

Value

A composite ResourceSharer
